title: pelargonium × pusillum
intro: Pelargonium × pusillum, also known as Dwarf or Rock Pelargonium, is a small, evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and are known for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pusillum include relief from colds, flu, and other respiratory issues, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
